---
name: Feature request
about: A new vector extension, a new wizard behavior, a new platform or runtime, or anything else you wish the builder did.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want hintforge to do?

<!-- Describe the feature. Concrete examples are more useful than abstract asks. -->

## What problem does it solve?

<!-- The authoring or guide-maintenance friction this would relieve. If you have a specific game or guide in mind, mention it. -->

## What's the current workaround?

<!-- How you handle it today (manual workaround, custom template fork, give up, etc.). -->

## Is this scoped to the builder, or does it touch the reader too?

<!-- New vector extensions and wizard behaviors live here. Runtime behavior changes (dial logic, lookahead, persona discipline) belong at hintforge-reader. Cross-cutting requests are fine to file here -- we'll triage. -->

## Any references?

<!-- Other games / guides / projects that do something similar, or related GitHub issues. -->
